overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game follows a pedestrian through a rain-soaked dystopian city. The character walks beneath massive elevated highways, crosses busy intersections with neon billboards, and navigates wet streets while black smoke rises from a distant building in the background.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing a green shirt, red shorts, and a backpack along the rain-slicked sidewalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead with a backpack, maintaining pace along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass dominating the upper frame with support pillars
large vertical screen displaying a cartoon character with blue coloring
tall modern glass buildings with reflective surfaces visible in the background
orange-red metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The camera follows a pedestrian in a green shirt walking past digital billboards and orange railings, with glass skyscrapers visible through the haze in the background. The environment is sheltered from the rain by the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: traffic light changes to green, allowing pedestrian to begin crossing the multi-lane street
exits the sheltered area under the overpass and enters the open intersection with full sky exposure

agents.ego_description: following the pedestrian across the wet asphalt intersection as vehicles wait at the red light

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the traffic light, waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: tall pole with horizontal traffic signals showing red then green
white striped lines painted on the wet asphalt for pedestrian crossing
thick black smoke rising from a building fire visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The pedestrian approaches a traffic light and crosses the wide intersection as the signal changes. The camera emerges from under the overpass into the rain, revealing black smoke rising from a distant building. Vehicles wait at the red light as the crossing completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown plaza with large digital displays and palm trees

events.description: thick black smoke from the distant fire becomes more prominent against the gray sky
camera turns right while moving through the intersection, changing the perspective of the surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: moving through the wide intersection while observing the surrounding billboards, palm trees, and the distant smoke plume

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection on the wet road

entered.detail: massive screen displaying a woman's face with advertisements
tall palm trees lining the edge of the intersection
low concrete walls with red coloring separating pedestrian areas from traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open plaza intersection, revealing large digital billboards and palm trees. Black smoke continues to rise prominently in the distance as the camera turns, showing different angles of the elevated highways and surrounding glass towers. Vehicles navigate the wet streets while the rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with palm trees, billboards, and pedestrian walkways

events.description: passing a line of parked vehicles along the right curb of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians and parked cars, with the elevated highway still visible overhead

notable_agents.action: person holding a red and white umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass sides spanning across the street
tall modern street lamps with orange accents illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along a city street lined with palm trees and parked vehicles. A pedestrian with a red umbrella walks in the opposite direction. The elevated highway structure remains visible overhead while digital billboards and a pedestrian overpass appear in the distance. The rain continues to create reflective surfaces on the concrete sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a rain-drenched city intersection and along a palm-lined boulevard. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, following a pedestrian in a green shirt past digital billboards and orange railings. As the pedestrian reaches a traffic light, the camera emerges from the shelter of the overpass into the open rain, revealing black smoke rising from a distant building while vehicles wait at the intersection. The scene then expands across the wide plaza, passing palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers as the camera pivots to capture the scale of the overhead highways and the persistent smoke in the distance. Finally, the movement continues along a wet city street where the camera passes a pedestrian with a red umbrella, moving toward a distant pedestrian overpass under the constant fall of rain.
